summary: Removed Cosmos/SQL omitted-id assertions and v3 skip scaffolding while keeping 404 and invalid-output coverage; validated with TypeScript build, targeted lint, and the static security regression check.
followUps: Attempted targeted E2Es via `node out/index.js --model v3 --only cosmosDB.test.js`, but Core Tools startup was blocked by missing local emulator services (`Connection refused (127.0.0.1:10000)`). Re-run the v3/v4 Cosmos and SQL suites in the full dockerized emulator environment (Azurite, Cosmos DB emulator, SQL container).
